item.title: German Shepherd Exercise Needs by Age
item.description: German shepherd exercise needs by age German Shepherds are magnificent, intelligent, and energetic dogs that thrive on activity. Originally bred as working dogs, they require substantial physical and mental stimulation to stay happy and healthy.
